result.stdout:
Description:
  Shipyard - .NET Packaging Tool for Linux

Usage:
  shipyard [options]

Options:
  --config <config> (REQUIRED)  Path to shipyard.json config file
  --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Path to the output directory for generated packages
  --clean                       Clean the output directory before building, if it already exists
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
  --version                     Show version information

Description:
  Shipyard - .NET Packaging Tool for Linux

Usage:

Options:

  --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Path to the output directory for generated packages
  --clean                       Clean the output directory before building, if it already exists
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
  --version                     Show version information
